admitted_facts.fact: The repository implements a forward-looking scenario simulation structure beginning in 2026.

The model distinguishes verified project facts, model identity, filed claims, reported claims, user-provided inputs, scenario assumptions, stress-test assumptions, unknowns, confidential private inputs, and derived outputs.
A one-terawatt value is treated as a scenario or stress-test assumption unless separately verified by an admissible source.
Any claimed electrical load must identify a comparable heat-rejection pathway and first-law balance.

excluded_claims: No verified Terafab operating site load is asserted.
No verified Terafab water permit value is asserted.
No proprietary Terafab data are included.
No Terafab endorsement, authorization, acquisition interest, or employee involvement is asserted.
